_why: Every lib/azure client must make network calls through the bounded transport (fetchWithTimeout / withDeadline), never a raw unbounded fetch() that can pin a worker on a hung backend. Baseline = the grandfathered raw fetches; it only shrinks.
_unblock: Route the call through fetchWithTimeout()/withDeadline(), then: node scripts/ci/check-breaker-coverage.mjs --update-baseline (run in the blocked PR with a one-line justification).
